findings: Voice polish complete (>=3 passes): em-dashes 0/1000 (<=6), And/But/Because/So sentence-starts 8.1% (<=12%), rhetorical commands 2 (<=3), 'to his defenders/critics' frames 2 (<=2), 0 banned filler, FK grade 6.9 (<=9.5). Reads as human/spoken, not AI-written. The single myth-busting line negates the popular misconception and avoids any forbidden 'convicted of insider trading/racketeering' collocation.

R3 wording locks held in narration: 'pleaded guilty' (never 'convicted at trial'); pleaded to SIX felonies (never insider-trading/RICO conviction); CHARGED (98) vs PLEADED (6) distinct; RICO + 92 dropped; ~$600M = $200M fine + $400M restitution; SEC lifetime ban remains; 2020 pardon = clemency not innocence; genius-vs-greed attributed, never settled.

Length expanded from the prior short draft (~2,871 words) to 4,235 words within the locked structure (hook/opening/4 acts/ending+CTA) to satisfy the mid 30:00 narration band and give the downstream runtime gate (27-33 min) margin.
